news.title:
Axis Bank consents in principle to Max Financial AMLI merger under set conditions.
Max Financial to offer undertakings; JV pact includes governance and exit options.
news.summary:
Axis Bank consents in principle to Max Financial AMLI merger under set conditions.
Max Financial to offer undertakings; JV pact includes governance and exit options.

news.title:

Total trade value amounted to Rs.199.67 crores.
news.summary:

news.title:
Axis Bank sees heavy call option activity ahead of 30 Mar 2026 expiry.
Activity reflects bullish positioning despite recent underperformance and caution.
news.summary:

news.title:
Axis Bank conducted an analyst/investor meet on March 2, 2026, per Regulation 30.
Event held at Daiwa Investment Conference, Tokyo; details on Axis Bank's website.
news.summary:

news.title:
Apple is in talks with ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank to launch Apple Pay in India by mid-2026.
Apple Pay aims to support UPI and card payments, competing with Google Pay, PhonePe, and Paytm in India's growing digital payments market.
news.summary:
Apple is in talks with ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank to launch Apple Pay in India by mid-2026.
Apple Pay aims to support UPI and card payments, competing with Google Pay, PhonePe, and Paytm in India's growing digital payments market.

news.title:
Axis Bank executed a block trade of ~1,107,186 shares at Rs. 1398.1.
The trade totalled Rs. 154.8 crores on the NSE.
news.summary:

news.title:
Kotak Institutional sees ICICI, Axis, and SBI as strong picks amid PSU-private bank narrowing.
Mid-tier PSU banks show operating metrics akin to private lenders; growth at 13-15% with lower credit costs.
news.summary:
Kotak Institutional sees ICICI, Axis, and SBI as strong picks amid PSU-private bank narrowing.
Mid-tier PSU banks show operating metrics akin to private lenders; growth at 13-15% with lower credit costs.

news.title:
Axis Bank denied plans to bid for a stake in CreditAccess Grameen, dismissing speculation.
CLSA noted potential synergies in such a deal, highlighting benefits like high margins and recovery in microfinance.
news.summary:
Axis Bank denied plans to bid for a stake in CreditAccess Grameen, dismissing speculation.
CLSA noted potential synergies in such a deal, highlighting benefits like high margins and recovery in microfinance.

news.title:
Nifty remains in the 25,500-26,000 range, with banks like IDFC First, AU Small Finance, and Axis Bank in focus.
PSU Bank index gained 5.5% last week; exporters like UPL and Vikram Solar react to Trump tariff uncertainties.
news.summary:
Nifty remains in the 25,500-26,000 range, with banks like IDFC First, AU Small Finance, and Axis Bank in focus.
PSU Bank index gained 5.5% last week; exporters like UPL and Vikram Solar react to Trump tariff uncertainties.

news.title: Axis Bank clarified it has not submitted or plans to bid for a stake in CreditAccess Grameen.
news.summary: Axis Bank clarified it has not submitted or plans to bid for a stake in CreditAccess Grameen.

news.title:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
news.summary:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.

news.title:
Axis Bank shares rose 2.2% to ₹1,398.2 on BSE amid heavy volumes.
The stock is nearing its all-time high of ₹1,418.3, set on Feb 3, 2026.
news.summary:
Axis Bank shares rose 2.2% to ₹1,398.2 on BSE amid heavy volumes.
The stock is nearing its all-time high of ₹1,418.3, set on Feb 3, 2026.

news.title:
Axis Bank filed a complaint against ex-RCFL director for fund diversion.
The alleged diversion involves ₹38.95 crore under RCFL's resolution plan.
news.summary:
Axis Bank filed a complaint against ex-RCFL director for fund diversion.
The alleged diversion involves ₹38.95 crore under RCFL's resolution plan.

Presentation details are available on the Axis Bank website under the shareholders' corner.
news.summary:

news.title:
Morgan Stanley's picks include Tata Steel, Shriram Finance, Polycab, Grasim, Indian Oil, and Eternal, while cautioning on SBI Cards, SAIL, and SRF.
Jefferies highlights AU Small Finance Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Godrej Properties, Hindustan Zinc, JSW Energy, Bharat Forge, and Voltas.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley's picks include Tata Steel, Shriram Finance, Polycab, Grasim, Indian Oil, and Eternal, while cautioning on SBI Cards, SAIL, and SRF.
Jefferies highlights AU Small Finance Bank, Axis Bank, Bajaj Finance, Godrej Properties, Hindustan Zinc, JSW Energy, Bharat Forge, and Voltas.

news.title:
Axis Bank allotted 2.98 lakh equity shares under ESOP on 17 Feb 2026.
Paid-up share capital rose to Rs. 6,213.4M with 3,106.7M shares.
news.summary:
Axis Bank allotted 2.98 lakh equity shares under ESOP on 17 Feb 2026.
Paid-up share capital rose to Rs. 6,213.4M with 3,106.7M shares.

news.title:
Government bond prices dip ahead of ₹379B state debt auction; 10-20 year bonds attract better bids due to higher yields.
Private placements active: JSW Steel (₹50B), Axis Bank (₹350B), REC Limited (₹30B), and others raising funds via bonds.
news.summary:
Government bond prices dip ahead of ₹379B state debt auction; 10-20 year bonds attract better bids due to higher yields.
Private placements active: JSW Steel (₹50B), Axis Bank (₹350B), REC Limited (₹30B), and others raising funds via bonds.

news.title:
RBI's stricter norms on bundling insurance with loans may impact high-margin credit protect sales, pressuring VNB margins for insurers.
HDFC Life and ICICI Prudential face higher exposure risks, while SBI Life and Max Life are relatively insulated; banks may see modest fee income impact.
news.summary:
RBI's stricter norms on bundling insurance with loans may impact high-margin credit protect sales, pressuring VNB margins for insurers.
HDFC Life and ICICI Prudential face higher exposure risks, while SBI Life and Max Life are relatively insulated; banks may see modest fee income impact.

news.title:
Axis Bank aims for loan growth 300 bps above industry and improving NIMs.
Axis Bank's net profit in Q3FY26 grew 3% YoY to ₹6,489.6 crore, beating estimates.
news.summary:
Axis Bank aims for loan growth 300 bps above industry and improving NIMs.
Axis Bank's net profit in Q3FY26 grew 3% YoY to ₹6,489.6 crore, beating estimates.

news.title:
Indian banks earned ₹4,818 crore in FY25 from minimum balance penalties, with private banks like HDFC, Axis, and ICICI contributing significantly.
A parliamentary panel recommends fairer alternatives to penalties, suggesting capping charges and treating shortfalls as loans instead of imposing heavy fines.
news.summary:
Indian banks earned ₹4,818 crore in FY25 from minimum balance penalties, with private banks like HDFC, Axis, and ICICI contributing significantly.
A parliamentary panel recommends fairer alternatives to penalties, suggesting capping charges and treating shortfalls as loans instead of imposing heavy fines.
